shadcn.serverInstructions: Use for shadcn/ui component installation and registry browsing

context7.serverInstructions: Use for fetching up-to-date library documentation and code examples

playwright.serverInstructions: Use for browser automation, E2E testing, screenshots, form testing, and Lighthouse audits

chrome-devtools.serverInstructions: Use for browser automation via Chrome DevTools Protocol — working replacement for Chrome Extension

sentry.serverInstructions: Use to fetch production error stack traces, triage issues, check alert status. Prefer over opening the Sentry web dashboard. Requires OAuth on first use.

neon.serverInstructions: Use to run SQL, create preview database branches for risky migrations, inspect schema. Branch before modifying production data. Requires Neon account OAuth.
